title: leysera capillifolia
intro: Leysera capillifolia, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leysera capillifolia include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Leysera capillifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
